name: knowledge-graph-update
description: Extract entities and relationships from text and update the knowledge graph with new nodes and edges.

source_text.description: Text to extract entities and relationships from

merge_strategy.description: How to handle existing nodes: 'merge' (update), 'skip' (don't overwrite), 'replace' (overwrite)

steps.template:
Extract entities and relationships from the following text.
Domain: {{domain}}

Text:
{{source_text}}

For each entity, identify:
- Name (canonical form)
- Type (person, system, concept, technology, organization, etc.)
- Key attributes
- Confidence level (high/medium/low)

For each relationship, identify:
- Source entity → Relationship type → Target entity
- Relationship properties (strength, temporal, conditional)
- Evidence from text

Validate the extracted graph:
- Remove duplicate entities (merge by canonical name)
- Resolve conflicting relationships
- Apply merge strategy: {{merge_strategy}}
- Ensure relationship types are consistent and from a controlled vocabulary
- Flag low-confidence extractions for review
